name: Rhubarb and Cream Cheese Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 Cups rhubarb, cut into 1-inch pieces or chopped fine
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the rhubarb, sugar, cornstarch, and salt until thick.
2. Pour the mixture into an unbaked pie shell and bake at 425°F for 10 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, mix the cream cheese, sugar, and egg until creamy.
4. Spread the cream cheese mixture over the rhubarb filling.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
Note: If the filling completely fills the crust it may spill over. Instead of creating a decorative pie shell edge, pinch the dough every couple of inches to make it stand up. Baking until the filling is lightly browned and the center looks done can result in an overcooked pie.
